title: Scarecrows / Бабайки [HORROR]
description: Horror modpack that you'll never forget
body:
# **Whispers of the Abyss are Seraching for You**

### **YOU NEED TO MANUALLY SET JAVA 21 TO PLAY THIS MODPACK!**


![Dark forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b28ff0ec4b5e1a03fc283d5252d6f78ffaae8889_0.webp)

### Modern variant of popular **The Dwellers** Modpack, with more horror things and adventures
## **Modpack Features**: 
- ⚰️ Best horror mods from all Forge and Fabric using **Sinytra Connector**!
- 🗺️ Save your location in **Antique Atlas**
- 🌎 New generation and structures.
- 🎶 Sound overhaul (scary ambient sounds, footsteps and much more)
- ⚡ Parcool! Stamina and sanity, keep an eye on it!

_This is my first project released on Modrinth. So rate this and share with your friends pls._

<details>
<summary>Other Photos</summary>

![Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e89790373348e8604eab9055cd2ef4828e0bde88_0.webp)
</details>



If something doesn't work or broken (ik about broken world gen), use the **Bug Tracker** or DM me on discord @novathepurplecord.
